0.text: Fibrotic changes in the upper lobes of both lungs

1.text: Newly developed peribronchial ground-glass nodular densities in the lower lobe of the right lung, especially in the posterior and superior regions

2.text: Newly developed subpleural ground-glass nodular densities in the lower lobe of the right lung, especially in the posterior and superior regions

3.text: Calcified, subcentimeter, nonspecific nodules in both lungs
